case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. KEVIN C OGORMAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TRACY ECCLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585), COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550), AND COSTS (CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
